entities.name: WORLD ECONOMY

entities.description: The use of computers and telecommunications to store and transmit information

entities.name: INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY RIGHTS

entities.description: The safe handling and use of biotechnology to avoid risks to health and environment

entities.name: TRADE

entities.description: The practice of protecting the natural environment from degradation
